profile_basis.source: post-frankenjax-vgd3x RCH profile after flat GEMM SIMD landed

candidate.lever: Use std::simd::Simd<f64,4> lane accumulators in matmul_2d_blocked_row_block full MRxNR panels, seeding lanes from the running C value on non-first KC blocks.

proof.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-cmqsr-blocked-simd-test-20260606 cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture

benchmark.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-cmqsr-blocked-simd-bench-20260606 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64 --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

isomorphism_attempt.ordering: The candidate preserved pc-block order and ascending k order per output cell.
isomorphism_attempt.floating_point: The candidate used independent output-column lanes with no horizontal reductions, reassociation, mul_add calls, FMA forcing, mixed precision, BLAS, LAPACK, MKL, XLA, or unsafe code.
isomorphism_attempt.tie_breaking: No comparator/tie behavior exists for GEMM.

decision.reason: Same-worker Criterion regressed from 114.60 ms to 129.30 ms.

next_target: Stop lane-only tuning of the KC-blocked path. Next GEMM primitive should be packed-A/register blocking, recursive/cache-oblivious Dot under an explicit tolerance contract, or communication-avoiding GEMM after proving the behavior contract.
